positive: A central, symmetrical composition featuring interconnected celestial flora and cosmic fauna. Depict swirling nebulae transitioning into detailed constellations forming the silhouettes of mystical forest animals (e.g., deer, owls, stylized foxes). The artwork should utilize negative space heavily, creating sharp, graphic contrast. Style is neo-tattoo flash mixed with Art Nouveau botanical illustration. Limited color palette: deep indigo, burnt sienna, glowing gold accents, against a pitch black background. High-contrast linework, intricate details, clean vector aesthetic, suitable for direct transfer print on black apparel.
negative: text, lettering, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, noise, low quality, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, cross-eyed, gradient skin, realism, photo, messy background
